ON OCTOBER 3, 2017 IN ITS TENTATIVE RULING THE COURT ALERTED THE MOVING PARTY THAT THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS (OPPOSING PARTY WAS INFORMED THAT THE COURTESY COPY OF OPPOSITION HAS NOT BEEN PROVIDED EITHER). MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT TO THIS DATE. IN ACCORDANCE WITH SFLR 2.7B THIS DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF HECTOR BARRERA'S MOTION FOR RELIEF

Appearances: Erica I. De La Sierra of LeClair Ryan (415.913.4902) for defendant and responding party; Hayk Grigoryan of Olympia Law Group (213.835.1920) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving party.

Mr. Grigoryan states a copy of the amended complaint was submitted with the motion as required. Argued and the Court takes the matter under submission. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Continued To Mar-28-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RUSHMORE LOAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Appearances: Anna T. Pham of LeClair Ryan (415.913.4948) for defendant and moving party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Plaintiffs have not provided sufficient facts to sustain a claim under the Business and Professions Code 17200 because it is unclear whether Defendant's alleged conduct was unlawful, unfair, or fraudulent with respect to the loan modification requests. As to Plaintiff's second, third, and fourth causes of actions, Plaintiff does not provide sufficient facts to demonstrate that Defendant entered into agreement to review loan modification requests. Plaintiff's cause of action for injunctive relief is dependent on the survival other causes of action. Order signed. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RUSHMORE LOAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. On October 3, 2017 in its tentative ruling the Court alerted the moving party that the moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers (opposing party was informed that the courtesy copy of opposition has not been provided either). Moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to this date. In accordance with SFLR 2.7B this demurrer is ordered off calendar. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
